21	## How to add a new unit
22	1. Append sentences to `src/data/duolingo.json` (continue id numbering from 1051)
23	2. Add lesson entries to `DUOLINGO_LESSONS` array in `src/components/Courses.jsx`
24	3. Add unit info to `UNIT_INFO` object in `Courses.jsx`
25	4. Add unit number to the `[1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, ...]` array in the card-list render loop
26	5. `npm run build`
27
